subject: Build real-time voice & vision agents with our lowest latency yet

Build real-time conversational voice & vision agents

Try in Google AI  
Studio<https://c.gle/ADMV5J-LdOQzSALXinXwXdutnswSC2-w7gBM9TdBChtdxK1wL8FEi5GOwrCHCEkpd4iYzVwP6LwKLjNAVIcULBftiKPTv-C91uWTECXMP5zp-HIF_tsC5MKHIQhdYJG2fIR-IMMeFvwCg4EpbgXcWYLYlgDgBOzNrLZxyqv-AME6WaOXP3AtGcDYrB7FEGRLGTPA4OKouhnLjkfg2hnGdYrAK0dO>

Hi Denys,

We just launched the first real-time audio model in the Gemini 3 family  
giving you the tools to build more conversational, multimodal agents. The  
upgrades include:

- Higher task completion rates in noisy environments: The model now  
performs significantly better in function calling and tool use in  
real-world scenarios.
- Improved instruction following: The model now adheres to complex system  
instructions a lot better, even when the conversation takes unexpected  
turns.
- More natural and low-latency dialogue: The model is much more effective  
at recognizing acoustic nuances like pitch and pace, and is now a lot  
faster in response time.

Speak to vibe code and experience real-time instruction following and  
tool-calling capabilities


Try the dempo  
apphttps://c.gle/ADMV5J85rd7D5kF7WWwqjsLUol5K-MB-vvKJ0XX13BvYryD1AwmMCBMutZ5-ScinZ13RZ7uioNX3__at7iJ2wdx_vXtIuOnFPn5HVczJl9vkaUXSPSdCo03nU3mC6s0_QFTUZlIw3s96QMfQAUP9zn-_iS7vBtPjIN81Xi2McoRGIxwaMzrFB_obX-HgD3FWdvhH4JWWsygoYbNVYOZ_hnU3LCPiIi0>

Get started in minutes

You can use our GenAI  
SDKs<https://c.gle/ADMV5J8SeOoUrRlZHdiZU5tS4lmgynAROPzzK5rib-kUhO4S8ma3pM8If8NxeNfuNAg_2CYG0u6Z24kgVGrGXMNXNRfokybV3KFWpTE_XNQnMUs-O4K6Q5misAUaXlsBq06LtXtWG42GQ-W2BD5cF9lSr0adfFwfQD84mTPTjVUljTPCrgDpcpu0_z5O>  
on your server, connect directly to the  
WebSocket<https://c.gle/ADMV5J-7O-e8H-P8mFp8M12DJGwEpSOvmf8dOkCAFdpwdG09B23CAusNjHDeT7K5ltjZ2kvU-34rmog25Ic1K9ilESU3Pe2A_6Syl6Y14VKVJxKx8jX65JT8DCtDKxu6CKtPGricvnvoFGtxPIdl6ekVvbF__wx2RSveJuYYVH570T-LfJ6P1hVZyYrhXPlqMFfU-BHZj4gp_DUnlKHN0lHPFy4FklI>  
from your client, or use one of our partner  
integrations<https://c.gle/ADMV5J_5PpL0srpY4iywjf1bndr1gPcWvMzos2y7hma_3_33zPD0gC39dthlq80ddHNkvPqk7mGTRN2a3EFn8Yh9A13FW4CXCs12RnGRzbd1752OXPTeRYP4tjumFlgTOlGiITQIcOmxUjxj4hZ1A0_Ost1IzVMiOxMJII7eT4mRTjOECIsHNq9Pqct3_o3ntAAXM3jvTuitO7ZS>  
for WebRTC support.

import asyncio

from google import genai

client = genai.Client(api_key="YOUR_API_KEY")

model = "gemini-3.1-flash-live-preview"

config = {"response_modalities": ["AUDIO"]}

async def main():

async with client.aio.live.connect(model=model, config=config) as session:

print("Session started")

# Send content...

if __name__ == "__main__":

asyncio.run(main())
